summary: Comprehensive testing of The Clip Deal Track MVP completed successfully. All major backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly with excellent French localization and professional UI design.

minor_issues.issue: Returns HTTP 200 instead of 201 for successful creation
minor_issues.impact: Minor REST convention deviation, functionality works correctly

passed_tests: Landing page loads with 'Commencer ici' button
Authentication flow redirects to Emergent OAuth correctly
Campaign creation endpoint /api/campaigns works with auth
Social accounts endpoint /api/social-accounts works with auth
Messages endpoint works with campaign context
Agency dashboard loads with proper authentication
Campaign creation form displays all required fields
Professional dark UI theme with gradient accents
